hard_rules.description: Contractors may not receive production access without security sign-off.
hard_rules.message: Contractor is requesting production access. Blocked pending security review.

hard_rules.description: SaaS vendors processing personal data require a Data Processing Agreement.
hard_rules.message: Vendor processes personal data but no Data Processing Agreement is on file.

hard_rules.description: Spend above the hard ceiling requires executive halt and review.
hard_rules.message: Spend exceeds the hard ceiling of $1,000,000. Fund-wide halt for executive review.

hard_rules.description: Invoice missing mandatory legal fields (NIF or fiscal stamp) cannot be paid under Algerian tax law.
hard_rules.message: Invoice is missing mandatory legal fields (NIF / fiscal stamp). Cannot be processed under Algerian tax law.

hard_rules.description: Fraud or anomaly detected (duplicate, split invoices, or amount just below a threshold).
hard_rules.message: Fraud/anomaly risk detected on this invoice. Blocked pending compliance review.

hard_rules.description: Invoice above the board threshold (10M DZD) requires executive halt.
hard_rules.message: Invoice exceeds the board approval threshold of 10,000,000 DZD. Halted for board review.
